title: NoduleHeader
description: The JSON projection of a parsed structured nodule header (DN-06 §6; the Nodule-Header-and-Project-Manifest spec §3, Accepted 2026-06-16). The required in-file marker is `// nodule: <dotted.name>` (or bare `// nodule`); optional `// @key: value` lines carry the closed v0 key set. Metadata is NOT identity — it never perturbs a definition's content hash (ADR-003). The closed key set is enforced by `additionalProperties: false`.

x-mycelium.$comment: JSON Schema fixes the closed key set, the value shapes, and the types. Two honesty-load-bearing checks live in code (mycelium-proj::header), not the regex: (1) `license` must be a recognised SPDX id/expression (membership in KNOWN_SPDX — a pattern only checks the token shape); (2) `since`/`updated` must be a real calendar date (month 1-12, day 1-31 — the date regex only checks YYYY-MM-DD shape). Both are explicit errors at parse time (G2). Duplicate `@key` lines are likewise a parse-time error (a JSON object cannot express duplicate keys).

name.description: The nodule's dotted logical name (from the marker). Absent for a bare `// nodule` marker.

version.description: Semver release label; inherits from project.version.

license.description: SPDX identifier or expression; inherits from project.license. SPDX *membership* is checked in code (see x-mycelium.$comment).

authors.description: Comma-separated in the header; inherits from project.authors.

since.description: First publication (ISO-8601 date); inherits from project.since. Calendar-range checked in code.

updated.description: Last update (ISO-8601 date); per-file, author-maintained (§7.4); never inherited.

deprecated.description: A flag or a reason string flagging this nodule superseded; per-file, never inherited.
